mapper.select: SELECT inspection_id, title, business_type, verification_status, internal_road_address, internal_detail_address, internal_geocode_memo, public_address_summary, public_landmark_hint, deposit_amount, monthly_rent_amount, premium_amount, area_square_meters, business_fit_memo, condition_memo, price_private_note, private_memo, internal_risk_memo FROM property_inspections WHERE inspection_id = #{inspectionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property_inspections ( title, business_type, verification_status, internal_road_address, internal_detail_address, internal_geocode_memo, public_address_summary, public_landmark_hint, deposit_amount, monthly_rent_amount, premium_amount, area_square_meters, business_fit_memo, condition_memo, price_private_note, private_memo, internal_risk_memo ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{businessType}, #{verificationStatus}, #{internalRoadAddress}, #{internalDetailAddress}, #{internalGeocodeMemo}, #{publicAddressSummary}, #{publicLandmarkHint}, #{depositAmount}, #{monthlyRentAmount}, #{premiumAmount}, #{areaSquareMeters}, #{businessFitMemo}, #{conditionMemo}, #{pricePrivateNote}, #{privateMemo}, #{internalRiskMemo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE property_inspections SET title = #{title}, business_type = #{businessType}, verification_status = #{verificationStatus}, internal_road_address = #{internalRoadAddress}, internal_detail_address = #{internalDetailAddress}, internal_geocode_memo = #{internalGeocodeMemo}, public_address_summary = #{publicAddressSummary}, public_landmark_hint = #{publicLandmarkHint}, deposit_amount = #{depositAmount}, monthly_rent_amount = #{monthlyRentAmount}, premium_amount = #{premiumAmount}, area_square_meters = #{areaSquareMeters}, business_fit_memo = #{businessFitMemo}, condition_memo = #{conditionMemo}, price_private_note = #{pricePrivateNote}, private_memo = #{privateMemo}, internal_risk_memo = #{internalRiskMemo} WHERE inspection_id = #{inspectionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property_file_attachments ( inspection_id, original_filename, storage_key, content_type, size_bytes ) VALUES ( #{inspectionId}, #{originalFilename}, #{storageKey}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes} )
mapper.select: SELECT inspection_id, original_filename, storage_key, content_type, size_bytes FROM property_file_attachments WHERE inspection_id = #{inspectionId} ORDER BY file_attachment_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property_facility_check_answers ( inspection_id, template_item_key, business_type, label, answer, customer_visible ) VALUES ( #{inspectionId}, #{templateItemKey}, #{businessType}, #{label}, #{answer}, #{customerVisible} )
mapper.select: SELECT inspection_id, template_item_key, business_type, label, answer, customer_visible FROM property_facility_check_answers WHERE inspection_id = #{inspectionId} ORDER BY facility_check_answer_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property_search_index ( inspection_id, title, public_address_summary, public_landmark_hint, business_type, verification_status, area_square_meters, search_text ) VALUES ( #{inspectionId}, #{title}, #{publicAddressSummary}, #{publicLandmarkHint}, #{businessType}, #{verificationStatus}, #{areaSquareMeters}, #{searchText} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), public_address_summary = VALUES(public_address_summary), public_landmark_hint = VALUES(public_landmark_hint), business_type = VALUES(business_type), verification_status = VALUES(verification_status), area_square_meters = VALUES(area_square_meters), search_text = VALUES(search_text), indexed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT inspection_id, title, public_address_summary, public_landmark_hint, business_type, verification_status, area_square_meters, search_text FROM property_search_index WHERE inspection_id = #{inspectionId}
